title: Upon The Nipples Of Julia's Breast
content:
Have ye beheld (with much delight)
A red rose peeping through a white?
Or else a cherry (double graced)
Within a lily? Centre placed?
Or ever marked the pretty beam
A strawberry shows half drowned in cream?
Or seen rich rubies blushing through
A pure smooth pearl, and orient too?
So like to this, nay all the rest,
Is each neat niplet of her breast.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon The Nipples Of Julia's Breast"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
